tools.name: find-isp-offers-carousel
tools.description: Find internet service providers by ZIP code or city name and display in a swipeable carousel. Use this alternative layout only when the user explicitly requests a carousel, cards, or slideshow view.

tools.name: find-isp-offers-table
tools.description: Find internet service providers by ZIP code or city name and display in a side-by-side table. Use this alternative layout only when the user explicitly requests a table or side-by-side view.

tools.name: find-isp-offers-list
tools.description: Find internet service providers by ZIP code or city name. This is the default layout, showing offers in a detailed list with full information.
